title: 25:08 ГўВҖВ” March 20, 2025
body_text:
25:08 ГўВҖВ” March 20, 2025
New Training Video ГўВҖВңUsing MTS for Wires User and Branch SettingsГўВҖВқ and Updates to the Wires Part
We added a new Wires training video ГўВҖВңUsing MTS for Wires User and Branch SettingsГўВҖВқ to the
Training Videos
page. This video provides procedures on using MTS to manage Wires application user permissions, MTS Administrator permissions, and branch settings. Captions are available. We added links to the Wires training video category in related sections of the Wires Part. We also made minor editorial changes to the Part.
Electronic Payments Volume
Wires Part
